features.title: Isolate Playwright database lifecycle
features.description: Run all Playwright setup, fixtures, and the application server against a freshly migrated E2E-only SQLite database while preserving db/dev.db for normal development.
acceptance_criteria: Normal development still defaults to db/dev.db.
The E2E suite never deletes or writes db/dev.db, including SQLite WAL and SHM files.
All E2E setup, seed helpers, and application requests use one isolated E2E database.
Guarded database preparation completes before the project-started Next server opens SQLite.
The suite does not reuse an arbitrary existing development server.
The full E2E suite passes twice without weakening product assertions.
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions

features.title: Make successful login navigation race-free
features.description: After a successful login response, navigate directly to goal spaces without refreshing the stale login route.
acceptance_criteria: Successful LoginForm submission does not call router.refresh before navigation.
Login API request and failure messaging remain unchanged.
The browser E2E login reaches goal spaces on the isolated server.

features.title: Make SSE response cancellation safe
features.description: Prevent the composed SSE response from issuing an unhandled rejection when cancellation reaches a locked live stream.
acceptance_criteria: A browser/SSE response cancellation cancels the retained reader rather than an already locked source stream and does not emit an unhandled rejection.
Existing SSE authentication, authorization, and replay behavior remains unchanged.
The cancellation path has focused automated regression coverage.
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
